description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, bound together by a wide, dark brown strap running across their width. The top book features a dark blue cover with a subtle fabric texture and a thin gold accent line near the edge, while the bottom book has a slightly darker, purplish cover. The pages are visible from the sides, showing a realistic, slightly yellowed paper texture. The strap appears to be made of leather or a similar material, adding a utilitarian touch. No visible illustrations or text are present on the covers or spines, giving the books a classic, understated appearance.
description: Two stacked hardcover books bound by a wide brown strap, with dark blue and purple covers and visible textured pages.
description_view_0: View from the side shows the textured pages of both books and the brown strap running across the top.
description_view_1: View from the end highlights the solid dark covers and the strap running lengthwise over the books.
description_view_2: Opposite side view again shows the page edges and the strap, with the gold accent line on the top book visible.
description_view_3: View from the other end displays the page edges and the strap, with both book covers visible but no text or illustration.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are solid dark colors with no visible text or decorative elements. The top book's spine is dark blue, and the bottom is purple.
